title: helenium anatolicum
intro: Helenium anatolicum, also known as Golden Ragwort or Oriental Helenium, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) with yellow daisy-like flowers. The medicinal properties of Helenium anatolicum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Helenium anatolicum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
